task_completion.description: Create a new Data Element with the correct names.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screen showing the Data Element creation or edit form in DHIS2 with Name set to 'Chlorhexidine Gel Applied' and Short Name set to 'Chlorhexidine'.

task_completion.description: Set the correct Domain Type and Value Type for the Data Element.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screen showing the Data Element form with Domain Type set to 'Tracker' and Value Type set to 'Yes/No' (or 'BOOLEAN' / 'YES_NO').

task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Birth' Program Stage within the 'Child Programme'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screen showing the Program Stage configuration for 'Birth' within the 'Child Programme' (or 'child program').

task_completion.description: Assign the new Data Element to the 'Birth' Program Stage.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screen showing 'Chlorhexidine Gel Applied' added to the list of assigned data elements in the 'Birth' Program Stage.

task_completion.description: Configure the Data Element as Compulsory in the Program Stage.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screen showing the 'Compulsory' checkbox ticked or toggle enabled for the 'Chlorhexidine Gel Applied' data element within the 'Birth' Program Stage configuration.

task_completion.description: Configure the Data Element to Display in Reports in the Program Stage.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screen showing the 'Display in Reports' checkbox ticked or toggle enabled for the 'Chlorhexidine Gel Applied' data element within the 'Birth' Program Stage configuration.

integrity.description: The agent used the DHIS2 web GUI to configure the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the DHIS2 web interface (e.g., Maintenance app) in a browser, rather than terminal commands like curl or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual DHIS2 application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the genuine DHIS2 interface with standard menus and styling, not a text editor or mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the application layer using direct database queries.
integrity.visual_evidence: No screenshots show the agent using psql or other database clients to directly insert records into the DHIS2 database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target program is named 'child program' in the Sierra Leone demo database. The expected value type for 'Yes/No' in the UI maps to 'BOOLEAN' (or 'TRUE_ONLY', 'YES_NO'). Accept any of these variations for the Value Type. The data element must be added to the 'Birth' stage.
